features: Italian-Inspired Luxury – Evoke the spirit of southern Italy with a captivating blend of citrus, floral, and woody notes.
Multi-Layered Scent Journey – Opens with bergamot, mandarin & orange blossom; unfolds into jasmine, wild honey & geranium; settles into sandalwood, olive, amber & musk.
Elegant Gift for Her – Beautifully packaged and ideal for birthdays, Mother’s Day, or treating yourself.
Vegan & Cruelty-Free – Made with care for you and the planet, without animal testing or animal-derived ingredients.
Beautifully Presented – Arrives in elegant packaging with a classic glass bottle that adds a touch of luxury to any dressing table or bathroom shelf.
